name: Freja
short_description: Ignorance Is bliss, or is it? Have you ever wondered if living in ignorance is better than to carry trauma? Freja is a first-person psychological thriller exploring this concept. Enter this dark and mysterious world and find out for yourself.
detailed_description:
Roadmap

Updated version of the demo is out now!


About the Game



Freja is a first-person psychological thriller about exploration, immersion and discovery.
A thrilling experience about confronting your inner demons.
Explore the remnants of an old high school as you help a woman with PTSD and selective amnesia, puzzle together her traumatic past.



Freja features the unique concept of integrating arcade games into the story. Instead of merely reading notes to remember what happened, players must instead uncover the truth through various oldschool minigames.

Exploration:

Puzzle together a fractured mind through exploration and object interactions.

Survival:

Survive the dangers lurking around the shadows by staying on your toes.

Arcade:

Play several minigames to learn about the past. A different approach to the horror genre.
